arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag's preparations for Man United's crunch game against Porto are thrown into disarray just 24 hours before kick-off
arts.sum: Manchester United has been forced to push back a press conference after their flight to Portugal was delayed for over three hours.

arts.ttl: Does the much-criticised Harry Maguire have a long-term future at Man United?
arts.sum: Manchester United will allegedly take their time when it comes to the future of experienced defender Harry Maguire.

arts.ttl: Porto boss bluntly speaks out on 'mistake' around struggling Erik ten Hag and Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester United face Porto in the Europa League on Thursday night, with pressure mounting on under-fire manager Erik ten Hag after a torrid start to the new season

arts.ttl: Ferguson 'recommends' 57-year-old 'to succeed Ten Hag' at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson would allegedly be in favour of Massimiliano Allegri becoming Manchester United's new head coach.

arts.ttl: Ten Hag breaks silence, Ratcliffe conversations and double Manchester United fitness boost
arts.sum: A round-up of the key Manchester United headlines on Wednesday, October 2

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy makes decision on replacing Ten Hag at Man Utd
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy continues to back Erik ten Hag despite his positive prospects of replacing him as Manchester United manager, according to a report. The club legend has impressed the new INEOS hierarchy at Old Trafford, but Van Nistelrooy is not yet eyeing up Ten Hag's managerial role, according to Ben Jacobs .

arts.ttl: Gary Neville warns Gareth Southgate about major issue he'd face as new Man Utd manager
arts.sum: Manchester United icon Gary Neville has spoken out on the links between his former club and ex-England boss Gareth Southgate as speculation over Erik ten Hag's future grows

arts.ttl: £70m wiped off Man United share price amid Erik ten Hag uncertainty
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag is under increasing scrutiny both on and off the field following the defeat to Tottenham Hotspur at the weekend

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Porto
arts.sum: CB: Lisandro Martinez - Ten Hag might want to consider managing Martinez's minutes given his recent injury history, but the manager hasn't really got a choice but to start the Argentine again in midweek. Man Utd were frustratingly held by FC Twente in their Europa League league phase opener last week, so they need the points not merely for Ten Hag's future but to ignite their continental campaign.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag press conference live Manchester United team news for Porto Europa League fixture
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag will speak to the media in Portugal ahead of Man United's match against FC Porto.
